compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md rule 4 to reference usage-aware throttling instead of 5 sub-agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Replace CLAUDE.md rule #4 text ("Never create more than 5 sub-agents at a time") with usage-aware throttling guidance referencing:
- orchestration.max_agents config key for upper bound
- Two throttle tiers: 90%/95% (5hr/7day) → MAX_AGENTS: 1, 95%/98% → MAX_AGENTS: 0
- MAX_AGENTS: unlimited when no cap is set and verdict is unlimited

Update corresponding text in:
- CLAUDE.md (rule #4 in Never Do These section)
- templates/CLAUDE.md.template (if exists)
- examples/CLAUDE.md.example (if exists)

### Unit test exemption justification
1. No conditional logic — text replacement in documentation
2. Tests are negative constraints (grep for absence of "5 sub-agents") — acceptable structural test
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — documentation files

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify)
- templates/CLAUDE.md.template (modify, if exists)
- examples/CLAUDE.md.example (modify, if exists)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] grep for "5 sub-agents" returns no matches across CLAUDE.md, templates/, examples/
  Verify: ! grep -rq "5 sub-agents" CLAUDE.md templates/ examples/ 2>/dev/null
- [ ] New rule references orchestration.max_agents
  Verify: grep -q "orchestration.max_agents" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] New rule references throttle tiers (90% and 95%)
  Verify: grep -q "90%" CLAUDE.md && grep -q "95%" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Located rule #4 in all 3 files (CLAUDE.md:106, templates/CLAUDE.md.template:37, examples/CLAUDE.md.example:57). All contain identical old text. Proceeding with replacement.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: All 3 files updated. Verification passed: no '5 sub-agents' matches remain; 'orchestration.max_agents' and throttle tier percentages (90%/95%/98%) present in CLAUDE.md. Ready for commit.
comments.author: Test
